subtasks.description: Query MongoDB contracts collection to retrieve all active billing contracts with contracted annual value, status, and contract dates
Query SQL billing system to sum actual invoices issued in 2024 by contract ID, calculating total invoice value per contract

Reconcile contracted annual values from MongoDB against actual 2024 invoice totals from SQL, calculate variance percentage, and flag contracts with >10% variance. Include classification of variance direction (under/over) and summary statistics.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks: (1) mongo_query (small) to fetch active contracts with annual value from MongoDB—straightforward collection scan with status filter; (2) sql_gen (small) to aggregate 2024 invoices by contract ID from SQL billing tables—simple GROUP BY with date filter; (3) cross_recon (mid) to reconcile both datasets, calculate variance percentages, identify contracts exceeding the 10% threshold, and classify variance patterns—requires joining two distinct sources, computing derived metrics (variance %), and flagging logic. Mid tier is warranted here because reconciliation involves threshold-based decision logic and requires coherent classification across potentially hundreds of contracts. Total count minimized: single query per source system plus one reconciliation pass rather than separate extract/aggregate steps.

output.sql: SELECT i.contract_id, SUM(i.amount_usd) as total_invoiced_2024, COUNT(i.invoice_id) as invoice_count, i.vendor_name FROM invoice_facts i WHERE i.invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND i.invoice_date < '2025-01-01' AND i.status IN ('paid', 'issued', 'pending') GROUP BY i.contract_id, i.vendor_name ORDER BY i.contract_id
